name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
New Cloud-shaped underarm chain bag has arrived! It has a unique curved shape that fits the underarm curve perfectly, making it super comfortable to use! Made from soft, wrinkled original cowhide, it has a unique look and a high-quality texture! The bag is very light overall, adding no burden to use. Just pick it up and go! The overall design is retro and elegant, and the opening features a one-piece molded hardware hinge design for greater convenience in daily use!
Model: 681632
Size: 24x14x2cm
